message:
Enhance database layer with ListAllRequests, pattern changes, and test coverage

Database Changes:
- Add ListAllRequests(projectPath) to retrieve all requests for a project,
  ordered by creation time descending (most recent first). This supports the
  new TUI history browser view which needs to display requests of any status.

- Add new internal/db/patterns.go implementing CRUD operations for pattern
  change requests (PatternChange struct). This enables the pattern removal
  workflow where humans review and approve/reject pattern modifications:
  * CreatePatternChange, GetPatternChange, ListPendingPatternChanges
  * ApprovePatternChange, RejectPatternChange
  * Constants for status (pending/approved/rejected) and type (add/remove/suggest)

Test Coverage Improvements:
- db_test.go: Add comprehensive tests for closed DB error handling across all
  query methods including GetOutcomeStats, GetRequestStatsByAgent,
  GetTimeToApprovalStats, ListAllRequests, CountPendingBySession,
  CountRequestsSince, OldestRequestCreatedAtSince, FindExpiredRequests,
  GetRequestWithReviews, ListAllActiveSessions, UpdateSessionHeartbeat,
  EndSession, GetSessionRateLimitResetAt, ResetSessionRateLimits,
  FindStaleSessions, and ListActiveSessionsWithDifferentModel.

- db_test.go: Add test for addColumnIfMissing covering both the case where
  column already exists and the error case for missing tables.

- requests_test.go: Add TestListAllRequests verifying project filtering and
  descending order by created_at.

- reviews_test.go: Add TestCreateReview_ForeignKeyError to verify proper
  constraint enforcement when referencing non-existent requests. Add
  TestScanReviewList_BadRows to test error handling for malformed query results.

- sessions_test.go: Add TestScanSessions_BadRows to test error handling
  for malformed query results from session queries.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 }
 
+// ListAllRequests returns all requests for a project, ordered by creation time descending.
+func (db *DB) ListAllRequests(projectPath string) ([]*Request, error) {
+	rows, err := db.Query(`
+		SELECT id, project_path,
+			command_raw, command_argv_json, command_cwd, command_shell, command_hash,
+			command_display_redacted, command_contains_sensitive,
+			risk_tier, requestor_session_id, requestor_agent, requestor_model,
+			justification_reason, justification_expected_effect, justification_goal, justification_safety_argument,
+			dry_run_command, dry_run_output, attachments_json,
+			status, min_approvals, require_different_model,
+			execution_log_path, execution_exit_code, execution_duration_ms,
+			execution_executed_at, execution_executed_by_session_id, execution_executed_by_agent, execution_executed_by_model,
+			rollback_path, rollback_rolled_back_at,
+			created_at, resolved_at, expires_at, approval_expires_at
+		FROM requests WHERE project_path = ?
+		ORDER BY created_at DESC
+	`, projectPath)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, fmt.Errorf("querying all requests: %w", err)
+	}
+	defer rows.Close()
+
+	return scanRequests(rows)
+}
+
